description: Welcome to THE BREEZE by Adera, a sought-after Georgie Award-winning community in Grandview Heights. This beautifully updated 3-bedroom, 2-bathroom townhome offers a highly functional layout with bright open-concept living, 9’ ceilings, and oversized windows. The spacious kitchen features quartz countertops, a large island, and brand-new stainless steel appliances. The entire home has been freshly painted throughout, making it truly move-in ready. Enjoy a sunny south-facing balcony, perfect for BBQs and morning coffee. Steps to Grandview Corners, Morgan Crossing, schools, and Hwy 99. Residents enjoy access to the 3,700 sq.ft. West Coast Club, featuring a gym, yoga studio, and sauna. A new Costco coming to the south adds exciting future growth potential.
